penalties.detail: 10% of declaration weight has no edges

adjustment.reason_zh: layer_violations 的 149 条上行边中约 81%(121 条)源自 Foundation 层的 Hilt DI 模块(AgentToolModule/ProjectModule/BuildEngineModule/AgentModule)与插件宿主类——@Provides/@Binds 按设计跨所有层构造实现,属依赖注入的图畸变而非真实分层倒置;扣除该 DI 接线噪声。
adjustment.reason_en: ~81% (121) of the 149 upward layer_violations originate from the Foundation layer's Hilt DI modules (AgentToolModule/ProjectModule/BuildEngineModule/AgentModule) and plugin-host classes, whose @Provides/@Binds wire implementations across every layer by design — a dependency-injection graph distortion, not a real layering inversion; discounting that DI wiring noise.

layers.name: Presentation
layers.summary: Jetpack Compose UI + Material 3 — chat, home, setup, settings, diagnostic screens, navigation, ViewModels and theme (MVVM + UDF).

classes.name: VibeApp
classes.description_zh: Hilt Application 类，初始化通知通道与应用生命周期观察器。
classes.description_en: Hilt Application class initializing notification channels and app-lifecycle observers.

classes.name: SetupNavGraph
classes.description_zh: 定义应用导航图，组织聊天、配置、设置、诊断等屏幕的路由与转场。
classes.description_en: Defines the app's navigation graph, organizing routes and transitions between chat, setup, settings, and diagnostic screens.

classes.name: ChatScreen
classes.signature: @OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable fun ChatScreen( chatViewModel: ChatViewModel = hiltViewModel(), onNavigateToAddPlatform: () -> Unit, onNavigateToDiagnostic: () -> Unit, onBackAction: () -> Unit )
classes.description_zh: 聊天界面 Composable，处理消息显示、文件附件、快照历史与项目备忘录面板。
classes.description_en: Chat screen composable handling message display, file attachments, snapshot history, and project memo panels.

classes.name: ChatViewModel
classes.description_zh: 聊天屏幕的中枢 ViewModel，管理消息收发、项目构建、快照与备忘录，并协调代理会话状态与 UI 更新。
classes.description_en: Central chat ViewModel managing message flow, project builds, snapshot history, memo editing, and diagnostic logging while coordinating agent-session state and UI updates.

classes.name: DiagnosticScreen
classes.signature: @OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable fun DiagnosticScreen( viewModel: DiagnosticViewModel = hiltViewModel(), onBackAction: () -> Unit, )
classes.description_zh: 诊断日志界面 Composable，详尽展示模型请求/响应、代理工具执行与构建结果。
classes.description_en: Diagnostic log screen composable displaying detailed summaries of model requests/responses, agent tool execution, and build results.

classes.name: HomeScreen
classes.signature: @OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class, ExperimentalFoundationApi::class) @Composable fun HomeScreen( homeViewModel: HomeViewModel = hiltViewModel(), settingOnClick: () -> Unit, onProjectClick: (chatId: Int, enabledPlatforms: List<String>) -> Unit, navigateToChat: (chatId: Int, enabledPlatforms: List<String>) -> Unit, )

classes.name: MainActivity
classes.description_zh: 应用入口 Activity，初始化 Material 3 主题、边到边布局与导航控制器。
classes.description_en: App entry-point Activity, initializing Material 3 theming, edge-to-edge layout, and the navigation controller.

classes.name: AboutScreen
classes.signature: @OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable fun AboutScreen( onNavigationClick: () -> Unit, onNavigationToLicense: () -> Unit )

classes.name: PlatformSettingScreen
classes.signature: @OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable fun PlatformSettingScreen( modifier: Modifier = Modifier, settingViewModel: PlatformSettingViewModel = hiltViewModel(), onNavigationClick: () -> Unit )

classes.name: SettingScreen
classes.signature: @OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable fun SettingScreen( modifier: Modifier = Modifier, settingViewModel: SettingViewModelV2 = hiltViewModel(), onNavigationClick: () -> Unit, onNavigateToAddPlatform: () -> Unit, onNavigateToPlatformSetting: (String) -> Unit, onNavigateToAboutPage: () -> Unit )
classes.description_zh: 设置界面 Composable，提供主题配置、平台管理与调试模式开关。
classes.description_en: Settings screen composable for theme configuration, platform management, and debug-mode toggling.

classes.name: SetupCompleteScreen
classes.signature: @Composable fun SetupCompleteScreen( modifier: Modifier = Modifier, onNavigate: (route: String) -> Unit, onBackAction: () -> Unit )

classes.name: SetupPlatformTypeScreen
classes.signature: @Composable fun SetupPlatformTypeScreen( modifier: Modifier = Modifier, setupViewModel: SetupViewModelV2 = hiltViewModel(), onPlatformTypeSelected: () -> Unit, onBackAction: () -> Unit )

classes.name: SetupPlatformWizardScreen
classes.signature: @Composable fun SetupPlatformWizardScreen( modifier: Modifier = Modifier, setupViewModel: SetupViewModelV2 = hiltViewModel(), onComplete: () -> Unit, onBackAction: () -> Unit )

classes.name: SaveStatus
classes.description_zh: 表示平台配置保存状态的密封类，跟踪保存进度与错误。
classes.description_en: Sealed class representing platform-configuration save status, tracking progress and error states.

classes.name: SetupViewModelV2
classes.description_zh: 处理 LLM 平台配置向导，管理 API 密钥、模型选择与平台切换的完整流程。
classes.description_en: Handles the multi-step LLM platform configuration wizard, managing API keys, model selection, and platform switching.

layers.name: Agent Harness
layers.summary: The AI code-generation harness — conversational agent loop, tool-calling, context compaction and the build-validation / crash-repair feedback cycle.

classes.name: AgentTool
classes.description_zh: 工具执行契约：定义工具元数据与异步 execute 方法，将模型的工具调用转为对项目工作区的具体操作。
classes.description_en: Tool execution contract: defines metadata and async execute that translates model calls into concrete workspace actions.

classes.name: AgentToolContext
classes.description_zh: 为工具执行提供会话上下文：聊天 ID、平台、迭代次数和项目标识。
classes.description_en: Provides execution context for tools: session chatId, platform, iteration count, and project identifier.

classes.name: AgentToolRegistry
classes.description_zh: 工具注册表：列出所有可用工具定义并按名称查找工具实现。
classes.description_en: Tool registry: lists all available tool definitions and looks up a tool implementation by name.

classes.name: AgentModelRequest
classes.description_zh: 发往模型提供商的请求：对话增量、完整历史、工具定义、调用策略与模型参数。
classes.description_en: Request sent to the model provider: conversation delta, full history, tool definitions, policy, and model parameters.

classes.name: AgentModelEvent
classes.description_zh: 模型提供商流式发出的事件：思考块、输出块、工具调用就绪或完成/失败状态。
classes.description_en: Events streamed from the model provider: thinking delta, output delta, tool-call ready, or completion/failure.

classes.name: AgentModelGateway
classes.description_zh: 模型提供商网关契约：流式发送单轮请求并发出增量事件（思考、输出、工具调用），统一多厂商差异。
classes.description_en: Model provider gateway contract: streams single-turn requests and emits incremental events (thinking, output, tool calls).

classes.name: AgentLoopCoordinator
classes.description_zh: 循环协调器契约：接收请求并为每个迭代步骤（思考、工具调用、输出）发出事件流。
classes.description_en: Loop coordinator contract: takes a request and emits an event stream for each iteration step (thinking, tool calls, output).

classes.name: AgentMessageRole
classes.description_zh: 枚举对话项的角色：系统提示、用户消息、助手回复或工具结果。
classes.description_en: Enum categorizing conversation items: SYSTEM, USER, ASSISTANT, or TOOL.

classes.name: AgentToolChoiceMode
classes.description_zh: 工具调用策略：NONE（禁止）、AUTO（可选）或 REQUIRED（强制工具调用）。
classes.description_en: Tool invocation policy: NONE (forbidden), AUTO (optional), or REQUIRED (force a tool call).

classes.name: AgentConversationItem
classes.description_zh: 对话历史中的单条消息项，包含角色、文本、工具调用与推理内容，用于重建模型上下文。
classes.description_en: Single message in conversation history with role, text, optional tool calls, and reasoning for model context reconstruction.

classes.name: AgentToolDefinition
classes.description_zh: 定义可用工具的元数据：名称、描述和 JSON Schema 输入模式，供模型理解可调用工具。
classes.description_en: Defines tool metadata for provider instruction: name, description, and JSON Schema input schema.

classes.name: AgentToolCall
classes.description_zh: 代表模型发起的单个工具调用请求，包含工具名称和 JSON 参数。
classes.description_en: Represents a single tool invocation request from the model with its name and parsed JSON arguments.

classes.name: AgentToolResult
classes.description_zh: 携带工具执行结果（成功或错误）和输出荷载，返回给模型进行下一轮处理。
classes.description_en: Carries tool execution outcome (success/error) and output payload back to the model for next-turn processing.

classes.name: AgentLoopRequest
classes.description_zh: 循环协调器的输入：聊天 ID、消息历史、平台、工具定义与迭代策略。
classes.description_en: Loop coordinator input: chatId, message history, platform, tool definitions, and iteration policy.

classes.name: AgentPlan
classes.description_zh: 代理计划：包含目标摘要、带状态的有序步骤与创建迭代号，用于多轮构建任务的跟踪与引导。
classes.description_en: Agent plan: goal summary, ordered steps with status, and creation iteration for guiding multi-turn build tasks.

classes.name: AgentLoopEvent
classes.description_zh: 循环发出的事件：循环开始/完成、模型轮次、增量（思考/输出）、工具执行、计划创建/更新。
classes.description_en: Events emitted by the loop: loop started/completed, model turns, deltas (thinking/output), tool execution, and plan create/update.

classes.name: AnthropicMessagesAgentGateway
classes.description_zh: Anthropic Messages API 网关：将完整对话历史映射为该 API 的消息格式，流式解析工具调用与增量输出。
classes.description_en: Anthropic Messages API gateway: maps full conversation history to API messages and streams tool calls and incremental output.

classes.name: DefaultAgentLoopCoordinator
classes.description_zh: 代理主循环协调器：迭代驱动模型流式输出、工具调用、上下文压缩、工作区快照捕获与计划跟踪。
classes.description_en: Main loop coordinator driving iterative model streaming, tool execution, conversation compaction, workspace snapshots, and plan tracking.

classes.name: ConversationCompactor
classes.description_zh: 上下文压缩中枢：链式运行三种策略（修剪、结构化摘要、模型摘要）使对话适配提供商上下文预算。
classes.description_en: Central compaction engine: chains three strategies (trim, structural summary, model summary) to fit the conversation within the provider context budget.

classes.name: ModelSummaryStrategy
classes.description_zh: 压缩策略其三：调用模型 API 对较旧轮次生成摘要，用单条 USER 摘要项替换多个轮次。
classes.description_en: Compaction strategy: calls the model API to summarize older turns, replacing multiple turns with a single summary USER item.

classes.name: ToolResultTrimStrategy
classes.description_zh: 压缩策略其一：修剪较旧轮次中体积大的工具输出（文件内容、构建日志、UI 树）以释放上下文预算。
classes.description_en: Compaction strategy: trims large tool-result payloads (file contents, build logs, UI trees) from older turns to free context budget.

classes.name: SessionMessageState
classes.description_zh: 活跃会话的消息状态快照：用户/助手消息与代理步骤项，是会话进行中状态的真实来源。
classes.description_en: In-session message state snapshot: user/assistant messages and agent step items; source of truth while the session runs.

classes.name: AgentSessionManager
classes.description_zh: 应用级会话管理器：持有活跃代理循环执行、消息状态演进与 Room 持久化，独立于 ViewModel 生命周期。
classes.description_en: App-scoped session manager owning active agent loop execution, message state evolution, and Room persistence independent of the ViewModel lifecycle.

classes.name: SearchIconTool
classes.description_zh: 搜索内置 Lucide 图标库并返回匹配图标 ID，供 update_project_icon 工具使用。
classes.description_en: Searches the bundled Lucide icon library by keyword and returns matching icon ids for use with update_project_icon.

classes.name: SearchUiPatternTool
classes.description_zh: 搜索 UI 模式库（组件块与屏幕模板），按关键字返回可用设计资源以指导生成。
classes.description_en: Searches the UI pattern library (component blocks and screen templates) by keyword to guide design decisions.

classes.name: GetUiPatternTool
classes.description_zh: 按 ID 取回完整 UI 模式：布局 XML 模板、插槽定义、使用说明与依赖。
classes.description_en: Fetches a full UI pattern by id: layout XML template, slot definitions, usage notes, and dependencies.

classes.name: GetDesignGuideTool
classes.description_zh: 取回 VibeApp 的 Android 设计指南或指定章节（设计令牌、组件、布局、创意）。
classes.description_en: Fetches the VibeApp Android design guide or a specific section (tokens, components, layout, creative).

layers.name: Features
layers.summary: Workspace-centric feature modules — project init/snapshot/memo, build invocation glue, launcher-icon generation, UI-pattern catalog and diagnostics.

classes.name: BuildFailureAnalyzer
classes.description_zh: 分析构建失败，分类错误、提取源码位置并生成可回灌给 AI 的修复建议，是自动修复循环的核心。
classes.description_en: Analyzes build failures, categorizing errors, extracting source locations, and generating fix suggestions fed back to the AI for the auto-repair loop.

classes.name: ChatDiagnosticLogger
classes.description_zh: 诊断日志记录接口，定义聊天轮次、模型请求、工具执行与构建结果的日志方法。
classes.description_en: Diagnostic logging interface defining methods for logging chat turns, model requests, tool execution, and build results.

classes.name: ChatDiagnosticLoggerImpl
classes.description_zh: 诊断日志实现，将事件序列化为 NDJSON 文件，支持日志迁移与删除。
classes.description_en: Diagnostic logging implementation serializing events as NDJSON files, supporting log migration and deletion.

classes.name: DiagnosticEvent
classes.description_zh: 可序列化的诊断事件，包含类别、级别、摘要与 JSON 负载用于分析。
classes.description_en: Serializable diagnostic event containing category, level, summary, and a JSON payload for analysis.

classes.name: DiagnosticContext
classes.description_zh: 诊断事件上下文，持有聊天、项目、平台与轮次标识用于追踪。
classes.description_en: Diagnostic context data holding chat, project, platform, and turn identifiers for tracing events.

classes.name: ModelRequestDiagnosticContext
classes.description_zh: 模型 API 请求的诊断上下文，包含提供商、模型、流式配置与令牌估算。
classes.description_en: Diagnostic context for model API requests containing provider, model, streaming config, and token estimates.

classes.name: ModelExecutionTrace
classes.description_zh: 追踪模型执行的生命周期时间戳与性能指标，从请求创建到响应完成。
classes.description_en: Traces model-execution lifecycle timestamps and performance metrics from request creation through response completion.

classes.name: DefaultProjectManager
classes.description_zh: 项目管理实现，负责项目创建、ID 生成、工作区生命周期与后台初始化。
classes.description_en: Project management implementation handling creation, id generation, workspace lifecycle, and background initialization.

classes.name: ProjectManager
classes.description_zh: 项目生命周期管理接口，处理项目创建、工作区打开、观察与删除。
classes.description_en: Project lifecycle management interface handling project creation, workspace opening, observation, and deletion.

classes.name: VibeProjectDirs
classes.description_zh: 解析项目工作区 `.vibe/` 元数据目录布局，定位快照、备忘录与恢复标记的位置。
classes.description_en: Resolves the `.vibe/` metadata directory layout for project workspaces, locating snapshots, memo, and restore markers.

classes.name: IntentStore
classes.description_zh: 项目意图存储接口，支持以 Markdown 格式读写由 LLM 维护的意图层。
classes.description_en: Project intent storage interface supporting read/write of the LLM-maintained intent layer in Markdown format.

classes.name: MemoLoader
classes.description_zh: 从磁盘加载项目意图与大纲，组装压缩的项目备忘录文本块以注入系统提示。
classes.description_en: Loads project intent and outline from disk, assembling compressed project-memo text blocks for system-prompt injection.

classes.name: Intent
classes.description_zh: 项目意图层数据模型，存储应用目的、关键决策与已知限制的紧凑描述。
classes.description_en: Project intent-layer data model storing compact descriptions of app purpose, key decisions, and known limits.

classes.name: OutlineGenerator
classes.description_zh: 从 AndroidManifest.xml、资源文件与快照历史以零成本 grep 级解析重建项目大纲。
classes.description_en: Regenerates the project outline from AndroidManifest.xml, resource files, and snapshot history using zero-cost grep-level parsing.

classes.name: DefaultSnapshotManager
classes.description_zh: 快照管理实现，支持工作区转储、恢复、索引持久化与恢复标记处理。
classes.description_en: Snapshot management implementation supporting workspace dumping, restoration, index persistence, and recovery-marker handling.

classes.name: SystemClock
classes.description_zh: 系统时钟实现，为快照创建提供当前 epoch 毫秒时间戳。
classes.description_en: System clock implementation providing current epoch-millisecond timestamps for snapshot creation.

classes.name: SnapshotManager
classes.description_zh: 快照生命周期管理接口，支持准备、提交、恢复、删除与保留策略执行。
classes.description_en: Snapshot lifecycle management interface supporting prepare, commit, restore, delete, and retention-policy enforcement.

classes.name: ProjectInitializer
classes.description_zh: 项目初始化与构建协调器，管理模板抽取、项目定制、APK 查找与多阶段构建管道的调用。
classes.description_en: Project initialization and build coordinator managing template extraction, project customization, APK lookup, and the multi-stage build pipeline invocation.

classes.name: PatternLibrary
classes.description_zh: 从 assets/patterns/ 加载 UI 模式块与屏幕模板的目录，支持关键字搜索与按需加载。
classes.description_en: Catalog of UI pattern blocks and screen templates loaded from assets/patterns/, supporting keyword search and on-demand loading.

layers.name: Data
layers.summary: Repositories, multi-provider AI network clients (Anthropic/OpenAI/Qwen/...), Room database (entities/DAOs), DataStore preferences and request/response DTOs.

classes.name: ModelConstants
classes.description_zh: 模型常量对象，汇总所有 AI 服务商的官方 API 端点与生成聊天标题的提示模板。
classes.description_en: Constants object defining API URLs for all supported AI providers and prompt templates for chat-title generation.

classes.name: ChatDatabaseV2
classes.description_zh: Room 数据库抽象类，声明聊天、消息、厂商与项目表的 v3 数据库架构及各 DAO 访问器。
classes.description_en: Room Database abstract class defining the v3 schema for chats, messages, platforms, and projects with DAO accessors.

classes.name: ChatPlatformModelV2Dao
classes.description_zh: Room DAO，管理聊天与厂商模型映射的增改查与按聊天/厂商 UID 的级联删除。
classes.description_en: Room DAO for chat-platform-model associations, supporting upsert and cascading deletion by chat or platform UID.

classes.name: ChatRoomV2Dao
classes.description_zh: Room DAO，管理聊天室的增删改查与按标题搜索，按更新时间倒序返回。
classes.description_en: Room DAO for ChatRoomV2 entities, providing ordered retrieval, title-based search, and batch delete operations.

classes.name: MessageV2Dao
classes.description_zh: Room DAO，管理消息的增删改查与按内容搜索、按最新修改时间查询。
classes.description_en: Room DAO for MessageV2 entities, supporting per-chat retrieval, content-based search, and batch operations.

classes.name: PlatformV2Dao
classes.description_zh: Room DAO，管理多厂商 API 配置实体的增删改查，按平台 ID 排序返回。
classes.description_en: Room DAO for PlatformV2 configuration entities with standard insert, update, delete, and ordered retrieval.

classes.name: ProjectDao
classes.description_zh: Room DAO，管理项目实体的增删改查、构建状态更新与按名称查找/搜索。
classes.description_en: Room DAO for Project entities with build-status lifecycle updates, named lookup, and search support.

classes.name: ChatRoomV2
classes.description_zh: Room 聊天室实体，记录启用的厂商列表、标题与时间戳，支持 Parcelable 跨进程传递。
classes.description_en: Room ChatRoom entity with enabled platform UIDs, title, and timestamps, supporting Parcelable serialization.

classes.name: MessageV2
classes.description_zh: Room 消息实体，持久化聊天内容、思考过程、文件引用与修订历史，对聊天室外键级联删除。
classes.description_en: Room message entity persisting chat content, thoughts, file references, and revisions with cascade-delete FK to ChatRoomV2.

classes.name: PlatformV2
classes.description_zh: 多厂商 API 配置实体，存储不同 AI 服务商的端点、令牌、模型与推理参数以支撑多渠道调用。
classes.description_en: Multi-provider API configuration entity storing endpoint, token, model, and reasoning parameters for different AI services.

classes.name: ProjectBuildStatus
classes.description_zh: 项目构建状态枚举，定义 INITIALIZING、READY、BUILDING、SUCCESS、FAILED 生命周期并带 Room TypeConverter。
classes.description_en: Enum defining the project build lifecycle (INITIALIZING, READY, BUILDING, SUCCESS, FAILED) with a Room TypeConverter.

classes.name: Project
classes.description_zh: Room 项目实体，绑定工作区路径与构建状态生命周期，通过聊天 ID 级联关联到 ChatRoomV2。
classes.description_en: Room Project entity with workspace path and build-status lifecycle, with an FK cascade to ChatRoomV2.

classes.name: SettingDataSource
classes.description_zh: DataStore 偏好设置数据源接口，提供主题模式、动态主题与调试开关的异步读写。
classes.description_en: DataStore interface for app preferences, managing theme mode, dynamic theming, and debug-flag persistence.

classes.name: ThemeSetting
classes.description_zh: 主题配置数据类，组合动态主题与主题模式两个维度，供 UI 与 DataStore 消费。
classes.description_en: DTO combining dynamic theme and theme mode settings for UI display and DataStore serialization.

classes.name: ContentType
classes.description_zh: Anthropic 消息内容类型枚举，区分 TEXT 与 IMAGE 两种消息块类型。
classes.description_en: Enum for Anthropic message content types (TEXT, IMAGE) with JSON serialization names.

classes.name: MessageRequest
classes.description_zh: Anthropic 消息请求 DTO，编码模型、消息、思考配置、工具与推理参数，支持流式传输。
classes.description_en: Request DTO for the Anthropic messages API with model, messages, thinking config, tools, and streaming parameters.

classes.name: ErrorResponseChunk
classes.description_zh: Anthropic 错误流块，继承 MessageResponseChunk，封装错误详情以支持流式故障处理。
classes.description_en: Anthropic error response chunk extending MessageResponseChunk, handling stream-level error reporting.

classes.name: MessageResponseChunk
classes.description_zh: Anthropic 消息流块的密封类根，作为流事件多态分派的统一基类。
classes.description_en: Sealed class root for Anthropic streaming message chunks, enabling type-safe handling of diverse response event types.

classes.name: ResponsesRequest
classes.description_zh: OpenAI Responses（推理模型）API 请求 DTO，支持多轮输入项、推理配置、工具定义与响应格式控制。
classes.description_en: Request DTO for the OpenAI Responses API (reasoning models) with input items, reasoning config, and tool definitions.

classes.name: ResponsesStreamEvent
classes.description_zh: OpenAI Responses 推理 API 流事件的密封类层级，支持推理摘要、输出文本与工具调用的增量更新。
classes.description_en: Sealed class hierarchy for OpenAI Responses API streaming events, supporting reasoning summaries, output deltas, and tool calls.

classes.name: ResponseErrorEvent
classes.description_zh: OpenAI Responses API 流错误事件，继承 ResponsesStreamEvent，记录错误码与消息以支持故障诊断。
classes.description_en: OpenAI Responses API error event extending ResponsesStreamEvent with error code, message, and parameter context.

classes.name: UnknownEvent
classes.description_zh: OpenAI Responses API 未知事件单例，作为 SSE 流事件反序列化失败时的降级兜底。
classes.description_en: Singleton unknown event for the OpenAI Responses API, a fallback when stream-event deserialization fails.

classes.name: QwenChatCompletionRequest
classes.description_zh: Qwen 聊天补全请求 DTO，支持思考模式配置、工具定义与多模态消息内容的编码。
classes.description_en: DTO for Qwen chat completion requests, supporting thinking mode, tool definitions, and flexible message-content serialization.

classes.name: QwenToolCall
classes.description_zh: Qwen 工具调用数据类，编码函数名称、参数与调用 ID，作为 Qwen 消息中的工具调用元素。
classes.description_en: DTO representing a function tool call in Qwen messages with id, name, and serialized arguments.

classes.name: QwenChatCompletionResponse
classes.description_zh: Qwen 聊天补全响应 DTO，包含选择列表或错误详情，支持工具调用与思考内容。
classes.description_en: Response DTO for Qwen chat completion containing choices with tool calls and reasoning, or error details.

classes.name: ClientType
classes.description_zh: AI 服务商类型枚举，统一标识 OpenAI、Anthropic、Qwen、Kimi 等多个厂商的兼容实现以做多态分派。
classes.description_en: Enum identifying supported AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Qwen, Kimi, MiniMax, DeepSeek) for polymorphic client dispatch.

classes.name: DynamicTheme
classes.description_zh: 动态主题枚举，表示是否启用 Material 3 ColorScheme 的动态取色适配。
classes.description_en: Enum for the dynamic theme toggle (ON/OFF) controlling Material 3 ColorScheme adaptation.

classes.name: ThemeMode
classes.description_zh: 主题模式枚举，定义 SYSTEM、DARK、LIGHT 三种深浅模式及其序号查找。
classes.description_en: Enum defining theme appearance modes (SYSTEM, DARK, LIGHT) with ordinal-based lookup.

classes.name: AnthropicAPI
classes.description_zh: Anthropic API 的流式调用契约，定义消息流化的标准接口与可插拔的令牌、URL 配置。
classes.description_en: Interface contract for the Anthropic streaming API, defining message streaming with pluggable token and URL configuration.

classes.name: AnthropicAPIImpl
classes.description_zh: Anthropic API 的流式客户端实现，解析 SSE 事件并委托密封继承树 MessageResponseChunk 做多态分派。
classes.description_en: Anthropic streaming client implementation with SSE parsing and error handling via the sealed MessageResponseChunk types.

classes.name: OpenAIAPI
classes.description_zh: OpenAI 及兼容接口的流式调用契约，定义聊天补全与推理响应的异步流化。
classes.description_en: Interface contract for OpenAI-compatible streaming APIs, defining chat completion and reasoning response flows.

classes.name: OpenAIAPIImpl
classes.description_zh: OpenAI 及 Qwen 兼容 API 的流式客户端实现，解析 SSE 事件支持聊天补全、Responses 推理与非流式 Qwen 调用。
classes.description_en: OpenAI streaming client implementation with SSE event parsing for chat completion, the Responses API, and Qwen compatibility.

classes.name: ChatRepository
classes.description_zh: 聊天数据访问抽象接口，统一消息、聊天室与每会话厂商-模型映射的查询、搜索与保存。
classes.description_en: Repository interface for chat rooms, messages, and per-chat platform-to-model mappings with search and CRUD operations.

classes.name: ChatRepositoryImpl
classes.description_zh: 聊天仓库实现，编排三个 DAO 的消息、聊天室与模型映射操作，支持标题/消息混合搜索。
classes.description_en: Implementation orchestrating ChatRoomV2Dao, MessageV2Dao, and ChatPlatformModelV2Dao with title/message hybrid search.

classes.name: ProjectRepository
classes.description_zh: 项目数据访问抽象接口，统一项目增删改查、构建状态生命周期与工作区相关操作。
classes.description_en: Repository interface abstracting project CRUD, build-status lifecycle, and workspace-backed project operations.

classes.name: ProjectRepositoryImpl
classes.description_zh: 项目仓库实现，将项目、聊天与消息数据聚合为 ProjectWithChat，并支持工作区 strings.xml 的 app_name 改写。
classes.description_en: Implementation aggregating Project, ChatRoom, and Message data into ProjectWithChat with workspace strings.xml mutation.

classes.name: SettingRepository
classes.description_zh: 偏好设置数据访问抽象接口，统一管理主题、调试模式与厂商平台配置的持久化。
classes.description_en: Repository interface for theme preferences, debug mode, and platform configuration persistence.

classes.name: SettingRepositoryImpl
classes.description_zh: 偏好设置仓库实现，委托 DataStore 管理主题/调试设置，并经 Platform/PlatformModel DAO 管理厂商配置。
classes.description_en: Implementation delegating to DataStore for theme/debug settings and to Platform/PlatformModel DAOs for provider configuration.

layers.name: Build Engine
layers.summary: On-device build pipeline — RESOURCE → COMPILE → DEX → PACKAGE → SIGN, orchestrating AAPT2, Javac, D8, APK packaging and debug signing.

classes.name: JavacCompiler
classes.description_zh: 用 Sun Javac 将源码编译为 .class，分批处理 R.java 以规避内存受限设备的 OOM，classpath 含 AndroidX 与 Shadow 运行时库。
classes.description_en: Compiles sources to .class bytecode using Sun Javac, batching R.java to avoid OOM on memory-constrained devices, with AndroidX and Shadow runtime classpath entries.

classes.name: D8DexConverter
classes.description_zh: 用 Android D8 将 .class 字节码转为 DEX，支持预 DEX 库缓存优化以加速多 dex 构建。
classes.description_en: Converts compiled .class files to DEX bytecode using Google's D8, with optional pre-dexed library cache optimization for multi-dex scenarios.

classes.name: BuildStep
classes.description_zh: 抽象基类，统一各阶段（资源、编译、DEX、打包、签名）的执行生命周期、异常处理、日志记录与结果聚合。
classes.description_en: Abstract base class unifying lifecycle, error handling, logging, and result aggregation for each pipeline stage.

classes.name: BuildWorkspace
classes.description_zh: 层级化文件系统模型，将项目工作目录映射到各阶段标准化的输入/输出路径（源码、资源、class、dex、APK）。
classes.description_en: Hierarchical filesystem model mapping the project working directory to standardized stage-specific input/output paths (sources, resources, classes, dex, APK).

classes.name: RecordingLogger
classes.description_zh: 截获各阶段编译工具（Javac/AAPT2/D8）的诊断信息并持久化为结构化 BuildLogEntry，同时输出到 Logcat。
classes.description_en: Captures stage-specific diagnostics from Javac/AAPT2/D8 and persists them as structured BuildLogEntry records while printing to Logcat.

classes.name: BuildStage
classes.description_zh: 枚举化的构建阶段：RESOURCE（AAPT2）→ COMPILE（Javac）→ DEX（D8）→ PACKAGE（APK 组装）→ SIGN（签名）。
classes.description_en: Enumeration of the sequential build stages: RESOURCE (AAPT2), COMPILE (Javac), DEX (D8), PACKAGE (APK assembly), and SIGN.

classes.name: CompileInput
classes.description_zh: 承载源码、资源、清单、签名配置与编译选项的统一构建入参容器。
classes.description_en: Unified input container holding source files, resources, manifest, signing config, and compilation options for the build pipeline.

classes.name: BuildResult
classes.description_zh: 结构化构建产物模型，聚合各阶段产物、日志与错误，提供成功/失败结果工厂。
classes.description_en: Structured output model aggregating build artifacts, logs, and error details across all stages, with success/failure result factories.

classes.name: BuildPipeline
classes.description_zh: 构建流水线接口，定义 RESOURCE → COMPILE → DEX → PACKAGE → SIGN 五阶段顺序编排与进度监听能力。
classes.description_en: Pipeline interface defining the five-stage orchestration (RESOURCE → COMPILE → DEX → PACKAGE → SIGN) with progress-listener support and fail-fast semantics.

layers.name: Plugin Runtime
layers.summary: Tencent Shadow plugin-runtime shims that load and host the freshly built APK inside the host app without installation.

classes.name: HostActivityDelegator
classes.description_zh: 契约接口，规范插件 Activity 如何向宿主容器委托资源、主题、布局填充、Window 与 ClassLoader 访问。
classes.description_en: Interface contract defining how plugin Activities delegate resources, themes, layout inflation, windows, and ClassLoader access to the host container.

classes.name: ShadowActivity
classes.description_zh: 双模 Activity 基类，扩展 AppCompatActivity，经 HostActivityDelegator 在插件模式（委托宿主）与独立模式间动态切换。
classes.description_en: Dual-mode Activity base class extending AppCompatActivity, dynamically switching between plugin mode (delegating to the host) and standalone mode via HostActivityDelegator.

classes.name: ShadowApplication
classes.description_zh: 双模 Application 基类，在插件模式下将 getApplicationContext() 重定向到宿主的 ApplicationContext。
classes.description_en: Dual-mode Application base class that redirects getApplicationContext() to the host's ApplicationContext when operating as a plugin.

layers.name: Foundation
layers.summary: Cross-cutting wiring — Hilt dependency-injection modules, shared utilities and plugin glue.

classes.name: AgentModule
classes.description_zh: Hilt DI 模块，提供 AgentModelGateway、AgentToolRegistry 与 AgentLoopCoordinator 的单例实现。
classes.description_en: Hilt DI module providing singleton instances of AgentModelGateway, AgentToolRegistry, and AgentLoopCoordinator.

classes.name: AgentToolModule
classes.description_zh: Hilt DI 模块，将所有 AgentTool 实现（文件读写、构建、UI 检查、项目操作、Web 搜索等）绑定为单例组件的工具集合。
classes.description_en: Hilt DI module binding all AgentTool implementations (file read/write, build, UI inspect, project ops, web search) into the singleton component's AgentTool set.

classes.name: BuildEngineModule
classes.description_zh: Hilt DI 模块，装配构建引擎五阶段组件（Aapt2、Javac、D8、APK 打包、签名）并注入 DefaultBuildPipeline 编排器。
classes.description_en: Hilt DI module assembling the five build-engine stages (ResourceCompiler, Compiler, DexConverter, ApkBuilder, ApkSigner) and injecting them into DefaultBuildPipeline.

classes.name: ProjectModule
classes.description_zh: Hilt DI 模块，提供 ProjectRepository、ProjectManager、SnapshotManager 与 IntentStore 的单例实现。
classes.description_en: Hilt DI module providing singleton instances of ProjectRepository, ProjectManager, SnapshotManager, and IntentStore.

classes.name: PluginContainerActivity
classes.description_zh: 宿主容器 Activity（5 个进程隔离插槽之一），加载并托管运行时 APK 的 ShadowActivity，桥接宿主/插件生命周期、隔离资源与 ClassLoader 并处理崩溃日志。
classes.description_en: Host container Activity (one of 5 process-isolated slots) that loads and hosts a plugin ShadowActivity, bridges host/plugin lifecycle, isolates resources/themes/classloaders, and handles crash logging.

classes.name: ActivityHolder
classes.description_zh: 静态 Activity 引用注册表，使同进程内的 PluginContainerActivity 与 PluginInspectorService 经槽位索引共享 Activity 实例。
classes.description_en: Static Activity reference registry letting same-process PluginContainerActivity and PluginInspectorService share Activity instances via slot indices.

classes.name: PluginInspectorService
classes.description_zh: 运行于各插件进程的 AIDL 服务，经 JSON 选择器与动作提供视图树检查、UI 交互（点击/滑动/输入/等待）与截图能力。
classes.description_en: AIDL-based Service in each plugin process providing view-tree inspection, UI interaction (click, scroll, input, wait), and screenshot capture via JSON selectors and actions.

classes.name: PluginManager
classes.description_zh: 单例协调器，以 LRU 策略管理 5 个进程隔离插槽的 APK 启动与插件进程生命周期，并绑定各槽的 PluginInspectorService。
classes.description_en: Singleton coordinator managing 5 process-isolated plugin slots with LRU allocation, APK launch, plugin-process lifecycle, and PluginInspectorService binding.

classes.name: FileUtils
classes.description_zh: 工具对象，提供文件 I/O（URI 读取、Base64 编码、MIME 检测、大小校验）与视觉模型图像格式支持检查。
classes.description_en: Utility object providing file I/O (URI streaming, Base64 encoding, MIME detection, size validation) and vision-model image-format support checks.

flows.name: 从描述到 APK · Prompt → APK lifecycle
flows.description: 用户一句自然语言描述如何经聊天、代理循环、模型流式生成、端上构建直到在手机上运行真实 APK 的端到端贯穿。

steps.label_zh: 工具调用 + 生成代码
成功则加载并运行 APK
手机上运行的真实 App

flows.name: 代理循环单次迭代 · Agent loop iteration
flows.description: 协调器在一次迭代中压缩上下文、流式请求模型、按名分派工具、执行并推进会话状态，未完成则进入下一轮。

steps.label_zh: 增量输出 + 工具调用
推进并持久化消息状态
未完成则进入下一迭代

flows.name: 多模型提供商网关 · Multi-provider gateway
flows.description: 统一的网关契约经路由器按平台把单轮请求分派到 Anthropic / OpenAI / DeepSeek / Kimi / Qwen 各家实现，并流式回吐统一事件。

extra_nodes.name: AgentModelEvent 流 · event stream
extra_nodes.description_zh: 统一的思考/输出/工具调用增量事件

flows.name: 工具调用链 · Agent tool dispatch
flows.description: 模型的工具调用经注册表按名解析并分派到文件、构建运行、UI 检查、设计资源、计划备忘等数十个工作区工具实现。

extra_nodes.name: 模型 · Model
extra_nodes.description_zh: 发出 tool_call 的大语言模型

flows.name: 上下文压缩 · Conversation compaction
flows.description: 当对话超出提供商上下文预算时，压缩中枢依次施加修剪工具输出、结构化摘要、模型摘要三级策略，直至装入预算。

extra_nodes.name: 超预算的对话历史 · over-budget history
装入预算的对话 · budget-fitting conversation

flows.name: 端上构建流水线 · On-device build pipeline
flows.description: VibeApp 的招牌子系统：在手机上把生成的 Java/XML 工程依次经 AAPT2、Javac、D8、APK 打包与签名编译为可安装的真实 APK。

flows.name: 构建失败→自动修复 · Build-failure auto-repair
flows.description: 构建失败时，失败分析器分类错误并提取源位，结果回灌为工具输出后由模型重新生成补丁，循环重试直至构建通过。

steps.label_zh: 分类错误 + 修复建议

flows.name: 运行生成的 APK · Run via plugin runtime
flows.description: 插件管理器在进程隔离插槽中经 Tencent Shadow 运行时免安装托管刚构建的 APK，并通过检查服务驱动其 UI 与采集运行日志。

steps.label_zh: 视图树检查 + 驱动 UI
